rulings.Case Title: ERIC BOICE et al VS. HARCOURT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILIT et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)

rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO BUENO ET AL VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal And For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 22, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTs HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, HAWK LOU, HAWK LOU's Motion To Seal And For Protective Order Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Prior to 8:30 a.m. Defendant to file and serve on Plaintiff a detailed description of each page contained in Exs. 89 and 90. The Court notes that Ex. 89, as currently described in the moving papers, significantly differs from Ex. 89 discussed during the deposition at page 485:21-487:2. The Court also notes that Ex. 90 consists of 16 pages of which only one contains any hand-writing and no description of other pages is provided in the motion/declarations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAH B. LEE VS. TIFFANI TANAKA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 22, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT TIFFANI TANAKA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Delta motion to quash is DENIED. Borsuk v. Sup. Ct. (2015) 238 Cal.App.4th 1, 4. Motion to Quash re: service of Summons and Complaint is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
